'''chamate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:judiciously|judiciously]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-m-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:judiciously|judiciously]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| chamate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:chamate|chamate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chamatesher|chamatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chamatesherĂ«m|chamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chamatero|chamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chamateshĂ«|chamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chamateshĂ«m|chamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichamatero|gokichamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichamateshĂ«|gokichamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichamateshĂ«m|gokichamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochamankerom|gochamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochamankeshĂ«|gochamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochamankeshĂ«m|gochamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochamankeya|gochamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chamaterom|chamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chamatemu|chamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chamateya|chamateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichamaterom|gokichamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichamatemu|gokichamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichamateya|gokichamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:chamamate|chamamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chamamatesher|chamamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chamamatesherĂ«m|chamamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chamamatero|chamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chamamateshĂ«|chamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chamamateshĂ«m|chamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichamamatero|gokichamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichamamateshĂ«|gokichamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichamamateshĂ«m|gokichamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochamamankerom|gochamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochamamankeshĂ«|gochamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochamamankeshĂ«m|gochamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochamamankeya|gochamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chamamaterom|chamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chamamatemu|chamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chamamateya|chamamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichamamaterom|gokichamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichamamatemu|gokichamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichamamateya|gokichamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:chĂŠmĂŠte|chĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chĂŠmĂŠtesher|chĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|chĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠmĂŠtero|chĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|chĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|chĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠmĂŠtero|gokichĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokichĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokichĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochĂŠmĂŠnkerom|gochĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|gochĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gochĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochĂŠmĂŠnkeya|gochĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chĂŠmĂŠterom|chĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chĂŠmĂŠtemu|chĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chĂŠmĂŠteya|chĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichĂŠmĂŠterom|gokichĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokichĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichĂŠmĂŠteya|gokichĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:chafmafte|chafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:chafmaftesher|chafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafmaftesherĂ«m|chafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafmaftero|chafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:chafmafteshĂ«|chafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafmafteshĂ«m|chafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafmaftero|gokichafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokichafmafteshĂ«|gokichafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafmafteshĂ«m|gokichafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gochafmafnkerom|gochafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gochafmafnkeshĂ«|gochafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gochafmafnkeshĂ«m|gochafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gochafmafnkeya|gochafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:chafmafterom|chafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:chafmaftemu|chafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:chafmafteya|chafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokichafmafterom|gokichafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokichafmaftemu|gokichafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokichafmafteya|gokichafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
